titleStmt.title: SII 19.222: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 222. (A.R. No. 177 of 1907.) TIRUPPALĀTTUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ĀDIMŪLEŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of the date viz., Mithuna, Saturday, Chitta, give the possible equivalent A.D. 979, June 7 in the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

The inscription states that the assembly (peruṅguṟi-sabhai) of Uttamaśīlichaturvēdimaṅgalam on the southern bank (of the Kāvēri) received 4 mā of taxfree land within the boundaries of the village, from one Mūrtti Māṉavīraṉ of Pirambil in Paṭṭina-kūṟṟam for the formation of a maḍaiviḷāgam (round the temple) in exchange for (a smaller area of) half a mā of maḍaiviḷāgam already formed, the income from which was endowed by Māṉavīraṉ for the daily offerings and worship to the image of Sūryadēva set up by him in the temple. The inscription mentions a hall called Dayāparaṉ-ambalam in which the assembly met for transacting their business.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesariparmmarkku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu tenkarai brahmadeyam śrī Utta
maciliccaturvvetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Ivāṭṭai midhuṉanāyaṟṟuc caṉi
kkiḻamai peṟṟa cittiraināṉṟu pakal dayaāparaṉampalatte sabhaiyom kūṭi I
runtu paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattup pirammiluṭaiyāṉ murtti māṉaviraṉoṭu sa
bhaiyom parivarttaṉai ceyta paricāvatu Ivvuttamaciliccaturvvetima
ṅkalattu vaṭakuṟai viraśrīkāmukavatikku merkku Uttamacilivāykkālukku va
ṭakku kiḻakkuniṉṟu 4 kaṇṇuṟṟu mutaṟcatirattu viravalli colaippirāṉ kramavitta
ṉuḷḷiṭṭa catukkattārkkuṭ paṭṭa Aiñcāmpāṭakam Iraṇṭu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiya tirumiḻa
lai kaviciyaṉ caṭaiyaṉ [ bhaṭ] ṭaṉ pakkal Ivaṉ vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiya nilam 4 cce
yyum sabhaiyommiṭai viḷākattukkuāka Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl koṇṭu Inila
m Iṟaikāvalukkuāka Irukaḻañcu poṉ Ivaṉpakkal sabhaiyom koṇṭu Ipparicu
Iṟaiiḻiyttu Ivaṉitāyirunta Inilam 4 māvum Aṟuti parivattaṉaiyāṟ koṇṭu Itaṟ
kku talaimāṟuāka murtti māṉaviraṉukku Aṟutiparivarttataṉaiyāl kuṭutta nilamāvatu śrī kāmu
kavatikku merkku Āticcavāykkālukku vaṭakku kiḻakkuniṉṟu nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu teṉ māmaṭaivi
ḷākamāy kuṭiirukkiṟa nilam Araimāvum Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl kuṭuttu Inilam tirup pāṟṟuṟai
Ivaṉ ṉeḻuntaruḷuvitta sūryadevarkku Oru nāḻi Araciyāl loru tiruvamitukkum kaṟiya
mutukkum muṉṟu sandhiyum tiruvārātiṉai ceyuntaṉaip potaikku Iraṇṭu tiruviḷak
kukkum Āka Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyāl kuṭuttu Ipparitu Aṟutipparivarttaṉaiyolai
ceytu kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Itu Iṟaikāṭṭiṉāraiyum
Iṟaikāṭṭap paṇiccāraiyum kaṇakkar Iṟaikāṭṭa yaṉṟupatupoṉ mutuṟa panmāheśvararey kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟisabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.222 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
